title: stynx baseline error contract
description: Stable error response envelope every stynx endpoint produces via @stynx-nyx/core's StynxErrorFilter. Adopters extending with domain-specific errors author per-module *.errors.json files that reference this baseline.

errorCode.description: Stable machine-readable error identifier, format: `<DOMAIN>:<CATEGORY>:<DETAIL>`, e.g. `BOOKMARK:NOT_FOUND:by-id`

message.description: Human-readable explanation; safe to log + display

details.description: Optional per-error metadata; shape depends on errorCode

baseline_errors.description: Request body, query, or headers fail validation. Triggered by class-validator decorator chain on DTOs.
No bearer token or invalid bearer token presented. Issued by StynxAuthGuard.
Bearer token is well-formed but expired or revoked.
Authenticated but lacking the @Permission()-declared scope for this endpoint.
Path-parameter-keyed resource not found in the caller's tenant scope. Distinct from AUTH:FORBIDDEN — uses NotFoundException to avoid leaking existence across tenants.
Idempotency key already used for a different request body. Caller should not retry with the same key + different payload.
Tenant exceeded its per-window quota. Honor the `Retry-After` header.
Catch-all for unhandled exceptions. message is sanitized (no stack trace, no internal details). Detailed information is in the audit log keyed by requestId.
Downstream dependency (DB, S3, Cognito) did not respond within the configured timeout. Caller may retry.

extension_pattern: Adopter modules add per-module errors.json files (e.g. `domain/demo-bookmark/api/docs/errors.json`) that enumerate domain-specific errorCodes following the `<DOMAIN>:<CATEGORY>:<DETAIL>` shape. These extend (do not replace) the baseline above.

authority.promoted_during: stynx U5 batch (2026-05-17) to close F1×T8 spec_robustness_targets in INV-ERROR-001's measurement chain.
